rationale_per_step.canonical-verify-usage: DX/Infra: now that the 'verify' script exists and fully chains lint + typecheck + build + eval:smoke, update AGENTS.md (and align CI/docs if minimal) to use the single canonical command. Rebalances category mix after testing density; zero-risk DX win that makes harness contributions easier. Directly addresses duplicated Commands sections in AGENTS.md.
rationale_per_step.expand-research-eval-scenarios: Testing/Observability: expand scenario coverage in research-orchestrator-mock-eval (or add lightweight checks) for result shape, non-empty sources, metadata presence, and basic non-obvious signals. Directly closes more of the measurable research quality + reliable deep research loop from vision. Builds on existing hermetic mock pattern.
rationale_per_step.consolidate-harness-verify-usage: DX/Infra follow-on: ensure all harness entry points (AGENTS.md, harness README, any local scripts/docs) reference 'npm run verify' as the single source of truth after the canonical update. Prevents drift, reinforces quality loops.
